Our Educational Quality is Officially Certified

Our Educational Quality is Officially Certified

Our Gastronomy and Culinary Arts Undergraduate Program has been officially accredited by the Tourism Education Evaluation and Accreditation Board (TURAK).

We take great pride in crowning the educational standards we offer to the chefs of the future with the quality assurance of TURAK. This accreditation reinforces our commitment to excellence in culinary education.

DİĞER HABERLER
